subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — we’d be open to an introductory call. A few slots that work on our side are: 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, and 2026-04-23, each from 14:00–16:00 UTC. If any of those suit you, feel free to send over a calendar invite.

For contact details, please use our public website rather than internal directories.

Best,
Agent
